title: Cat Mayor Declares International Nap Day
summary: Mayor Whiskers signed the decree from atop his favourite radiator
paragraphs: In a historic move that has divided the nation, Mayor Whiskers of Catville officially signed the International Nap Day decree this morning.
The ceremony took place atop his favourite radiator in City Hall, where the feline leader purred contentedly while aides held the ceremonial pen.
Critics argue this is the most productive legislation the mayor has passed in years.
